description: Immerse yourself in the enchanting streets of Paris, where every corner whispers tales of art, culture, and romance. This four-day solo adventure is designed for the passionate fan of 'Emily in Paris', blending iconic sights with hidden gems that will make your heart flutter. From charming cafés to vibrant boutiques, you'll find the perfect spots to indulge in your love for the series while soaking in the rich history and artistic spirit of the City of Light.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Café des Deux Moulins
activities.description: Start your day at the charming Café des Deux Moulins, famous from 'Emily in Paris'. Enjoy a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait in a cozy atmosphere.
Climb up to the stunning Sacré-Cœur Basilica, where you can enjoy breathtaking views of Paris. The basilica's white domes are a perfect backdrop for memorable photos.
Enjoy lunch at Le Consulat, a picturesque restaurant in Montmartre. Savor traditional French dishes while soaking in the artistic vibe of the area.
Stroll through Place du Tertre, where local artists display their work. You might even find a unique piece to take home as a souvenir from your trip.
Discover the history of Montmartre at the Montmartre Museum, which showcases the area's artistic heritage and its famous residents.

activities.activity: Shopping for Emily in Paris Merchandise
activities.description: Head to local boutiques and shops to find exclusive 'Emily in Paris' merchandise. Look for unique souvenirs that capture the essence of the show.
Indulge in a hearty dinner at Le Relais Gascon, known for its delicious salads and traditional French cuisine. The cozy ambiance makes it a perfect end to your day.
Take a leisurely evening stroll through the charming streets of Montmartre. The area is beautifully lit at night, creating a romantic atmosphere.

days.title: Art and Fashion in Le Marais

activities.description: Start your day at the iconic Café de Flore, a favorite among artists and intellectuals. Enjoy a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait in a charming atmosphere.

Explore the Musée Picasso, which houses an extensive collection of works by the legendary artist Pablo Picasso. The museum is located in a beautiful historic hotel and offers a deep dive into his creative genius.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at Le Mary Celeste, known for its fresh seafood and vibrant atmosphere. Try their famous oysters or a seasonal tartine for a taste of local flavors.
Take a leisurely stroll through Place des Vosges, the oldest planned square in Paris. Admire the stunning architecture and perhaps grab a coffee at one of the nearby cafés.

activities.activity: Shopping for Emily in Paris Merchandise
activities.description: Head to the boutiques in Le Marais to find exclusive 'Emily in Paris' merchandise. Look for fashion items and souvenirs that capture the essence of the show.
Stop by the stunning Hôtel de Ville (City Hall) to admire its grand architecture. The building often hosts exhibitions and events, so check for any ongoing activities.

activities.activity: Dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte
activities.description: Indulge in a classic French dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte, famous for its steak-frites and secret sauce. A must-visit for meat lovers!
End your day with a peaceful walk along the Seine River. Enjoy the illuminated views of Paris and reflect on your day filled with art and culture.
Start your day at the iconic Café de Flore, a favorite of artists and intellectuals. Enjoy a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait in a charming atmosphere.
No trip to Paris is complete without a visit to the Eiffel Tower. Take the elevator to the top for breathtaking views of the city. Be sure to book your tickets in advance to avoid long lines!

activities.activity: Lunch at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte
activities.description: Savor a delicious steak-frites lunch at this popular bistro known for its secret sauce. The ambiance is lively, making it a perfect spot to recharge before more sightseeing.
Take a leisurely walk down the famous Champs-Élysées, lined with shops and cafés. This is a great opportunity to pick up some Emily in Paris-themed merchandise at local boutiques.
Head to Galeries Lafayette, a stunning department store known for its beautiful glass dome. Explore luxury brands and find unique souvenirs to take home.
Unwind in the beautiful Tuileries Garden, a perfect spot to relax after a day of exploring. Enjoy the serene atmosphere and perhaps grab a snack from a nearby vendor.
End your day with dinner at Le Procope, the oldest café in Paris. Indulge in traditional French cuisine in a historic setting that has hosted many famous figures.
Start your day at the iconic Café de Flore, a favorite haunt of artists and intellectuals. Enjoy a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait while soaking in the Parisian atmosphere.
Explore the world-renowned Louvre Museum, home to thousands of works of art including the Mona Lisa and the Venus de Milo. Be sure to book your tickets in advance to skip the long lines!
Enjoy a leisurely lunch at Le Fumoir, located just a short walk from the Louvre. This stylish restaurant offers a delightful menu featuring French classics in a chic setting.
Take a relaxing walk along the Seine River, where you can admire the beautiful bridges and historic buildings. This is a perfect opportunity to capture some stunning photos of Paris.
Visit Île de la Cité, the heart of Paris, and see the magnificent Notre-Dame Cathedral. Although the interior is closed for renovations, the exterior is still breathtaking and worth a visit.

activities.activity: Shopping for Emily in Paris Merchandise
activities.description: Head to the nearby shops to find exclusive 'Emily in Paris' merchandise. From stylish clothing to unique souvenirs, this is the perfect way to remember your trip.

activities.activity: Dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte
activities.description: Indulge in a classic French dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte, famous for its steak-frites and secret sauce. A must-try for meat lovers!
End your day with a magical evening cruise on the Seine River. Enjoy the illuminated landmarks of Paris, including the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre, from the water.
